name: github_set_repo_access_to_self_hosted_runner_group_in_org
description: Replace the list of repositories that have access to a self-hosted runner group in an organization (PUT /orgs/{org}/actions/runner-groups/{runner_group_id}/repositories). Provide selected_repository_ids (complete list). Classic tokens need admin:org scope. Success is HTTP 204. See GitHub REST self-hosted runner groups.
